steps.expression: window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__ && typeof window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState === 'function' && window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__.patchBuilderState({ selectedDimensions: ['eventDate'], viewMode: 'table', chartSpec: null })

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3 for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; return !!preview && (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length > 0; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || !preview.replaceFetchBehaviors) { return false; } preview.__inventoryDrillRetryBaseline = { errorCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'error').length, successCount: (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length }; return preview.replaceFetchBehaviors([{ match: { type: 'runtimePreview' }, error: 'Runtime preview fetch failed.' }]); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__inventoryDrillRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const errorCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'error').length; return errorCount > baseline.errorCount; })()

steps.text: We couldn't compile these runtime results

steps.expression: (() => { const panel = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Runtime preview fetch failed.') && text.includes('Drill to Publisher = Display'); })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; const baseline = preview?.__inventoryDrillRetryBaseline; if (!preview || !baseline) { return false; } const successCount = (preview.fetchEventHistory || []).filter((entry) => entry.type === 'runtimePreview' && entry.phase === 'success').length; return successCount > baseline.successCount; })()

(() => { const panel = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || ''; return !text.includes('Runtime preview fetch failed.'); })()

(() => { const headers = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview .forge-report-runtime-table-panel')?.querySelectorAll('th') || []; const labels = Array.from(headers).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim()); return labels.includes('Publisher') && !labels.includes('Channel'); })()
